description_long: This is a dark, ornate dagger or short sword with a highly decorative and menacing design. The blade is straight, tapering to a sharp point, and features deep grooves and jagged edges along its length. The crossguard is elaborate, with claw-like extensions and intricate cutouts, giving it a gothic or fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle is sculpted with a textured grip and ends in a circular pommel adorned with spiked, crown-like elements. The entire object appears to be made of a single dark metallic material, possibly steel or iron, with a matte or slightly glossy finish. Its overall aesthetic suggests it is ceremonial or symbolic, rather than purely utilitarian.
description: A dark, intricately designed dagger or short sword with a straight, pointed blade and a highly decorative, clawed crossguard and spiked pommel. The object exudes a gothic or fantasy style, appearing both menacing and ceremonial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ornate blade, clawed crossguard, and spiked circular pommel.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the symmetrical design and decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness and silhouette of the object.
attribute_handle_design: sculpted, textured, straight with a spiked circular pommel
attribute_ornamentation: elaborate cutouts, claw motifs, spiked crown-like pommel
